v1.0.0-crt-seed-roller.description:
# What is this?
This is an easy button for rolling tournament seeds for the upcoming 2026 Crystalis Randomizer Tournament. It will automatically produce the two YAMLs, set the generation and server settings, and generate the multiworld with just the click of the button, without any lasting effect on your local copy of host.yaml. 

These settings are forced when using this tool: 
- Generator settings
  - player_files: [a local temp folder that is cleaned up after running]
  - spoiler: 0 (i.e. no spoiler log)
  - race: 1 (race mode is on)
  - spoiler_only: false
  - skip_output: false
- Server settings
  - password: null
  - server_password: null
  - disable_item_cheat: true
  - hint_cost: 1000
  - release_mode: "disabled"
  - collect_mode: "disabled"
  - remaining_mode: "disabled"
  - compatibility: 0 (i.e. you must be on the exact version of Archipelago that the server is using in order to connect)

**NOTE**: This does not contain the Crystalis APWorld! You will need version 2.0.4 or greater of the APWorld installed in order to use this tool. You can find the 2.0.4 APWorld here: https://github.com/Ars-Ignis/Archipelago/releases/tag/v2.0.4-Crystalis

# Instructions
1. Close the Archipelago Launcher if you have it open.
2. Download `crt_2026_seed_roller.apworld` below.
3. Double-click the downloaded file. It may take a moment, but you should get a message that the apworld has been installed.
4. Open the Archipelago Launcher.
5. Either click on the Tools category on the left, or search for Crystalis in the search bar to find the new seed roller button.
6. Click `Open` on the new button. It should pop up a terminal (like doing a normal generation), followed by your output folder, where there should be a newly generated multiworld file, which should be a valid tournament seed.
v1.0.0-crt-seed-roller.title: 2026 Crystalis Randomizer Tournament Seed Roller - v1.0.0

v1.0.1-crt-seed-roller.description:
# Bugfix
- Compatibility is now set to 2, so as to not prevent PopTracker from connecting

v1.0.2-crt-seed-roller.description:
# Changes

- Renamed the YAML slots to `Combat` and `Exploration` to avoid confusion
- Added a spectator slot named `Commentary` for the commentary team to use

# Instructions

1. Close the Archipelago Launcher if you have it open.
2. Download crt_2026_seed_roller.apworld below.
3. Double-click the downloaded file. It may take a moment, but you should get a message that the apworld has been installed.
4. Open the Archipelago Launcher.
5. Either click on the Tools category on the left, or search for Crystalis in the search bar to find the new seed roller button.
6. Click Open on the new button. It should pop up a terminal (like doing a normal generation), followed by your output folder, where there should be a newly generated multiworld file, which should be a valid tournament seed.
